name: @hyperprior/pi-safety
description: Confirmation and protection layer for dangerous git/bash/edit/write actions
readme:
# @hyperprior/pi-safety

Safety guardrails for dangerous commands and protected paths.

## Installation\n
```bash
pi install npm:@hyperprior/pi-safety
```

## Notes

All plugins in this monorepo are namespaced under `@hyperprior` and built to be loaded as individual pi packages.
